name: Theatre Arts

sections.label: Theatre Arts Core (required of all theatre arts majors)

items.title: Theatre Production Lab (take 4 terms, 0.25 credits each)
History of Theatre and Drama I
History of Theatre and Drama II

options.title: General: three additional theatre arts (THE) courses, chosen with departmental approval
Acting: THE-170 Voice and Diction + THE-250 Acting II + one of {THE-160 Movement for the Stage, THE-260 Acting for the Camera, THE-270 Musical Theatre Acting, THE-350 Advanced Acting: Shakespeare}
Directing: THE-250 Acting II + THE-390 Directing II + one additional course in acting or design

Musical Theatre: MU-109 Theory of Music I + THE-170 Voice and Diction + THE-270 Musical Theatre Acting + four terms of MUA-522 Voice (0.6 ea) + one additional course credit in practical musical theatre (MUA-130V Musical Theatre Practicum, MUA-131V Opera Workshop, or approved musical theatre internship) + six seven-week dance courses (DAN-010 through DAN-045, 0.2 ea)

Technical Theatre/Design: three of {THE-220 Lighting Design, THE-230 Technical Production II, THE-232 Computer-Aided Drafting and Design, THE-242 Scene Design, THE-280 Costume Design, THE-288 History of Dress}

notes: Strongly recommended courses vary by emphasis and are not required for the major — consult the department. Acting: any DAN-010 through DAN-152, THE-162 Stage Make-Up, THE-452 Advanced Projects in Acting, PHL-105, PSY-100. Directing: ART-118, COM-237, THE-220, THE-242, THE-280, THE-350, THE-462, any art history course. Technical/Design: ART-118, any other art history course, ART-115, ART-145, ART-264, PHY-155 + PHY-155L, THE-442.
